title: ageratina paucibracteata
intro: Ageratina paucibracteata, also known as Mexican mint or Hierba del Cura, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Ageratina paucibracteata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate cold and flu symptoms, and even lower blood pressure. The herbal preparations of this plant often involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves, stems, or roots, which can be consumed as teas or added to topical creams and ointments.
